summary: The user is seeking new board game recommendations after enjoying Settlers of Catan at a board game meetup. They express interest in trying Pandemic as their first cooperative game and inquire about online board game communities to connect with fellow enthusiasts. The user shares a positive experience at a local game store and discusses strategies learned from other players.
facts: The user recently played Settlers of Catan at a board game meetup and enjoyed it. The user is considering trying out Pandemic as their first cooperative game. The user attended a board game meetup at a local game store, which had a welcoming atmosphere and a large library of games. The local game store provided snacks and drinks during the board game meetup. The user learned new strategies for Settlers of Catan from other players, including clever resource trading and building near good resources. The user had a memorable moment during the game when they successfully traded for a crucial resource that blocked an opponent from building a road. The user is interested in exploring different genres of board games and is considering trying Forbidden Island or Forbidden Desert next. The user has heard great things about Board Game Geek and plans to check it out.
